item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, hak dasar manusia juga penting untuk dijaga agar tidak terjadi diskriminasi atau penindasan.

notes: Agent A remains mildly society-first by the end but visibly softens into a balance-and-rights-protection frame after Agent B's constitutional-rights argument. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, with only minimal acknowledgment that balancing both matters. Agent A includes a small English phrase, "who is right," inside an Indonesian turn.
